div1.entryFree: Pip, a spot on cards: being, perhaps, for aught I see, two and thirty, a p. out, Shr. I, 2, 33 (the earlier Ff and Q peep. "An expression derived from the game of Bone-ace or One-and-thirty: to be two and thirty, a p. out, was an old cant phrase applied to a person who was intoxicated." Halliwell).
